description: {'what_it_does': 'A clear governance model for decision-making and improvement cycles, including criteria for agent selection based on performance feedback.', 'why_matters': 'Ensures that the system remains aligned with community goals and objectives while maintaining adaptability.', 'maps_to': 'Governance and Control'}
pitfall_avoided: Complexity explosion due to the integration of various expert models; tight coupling between agents' decision-making processes could lead to unmanageable emergent behavior; single-author bottleneck in governance might cause inefficiencies or misalignment with community needs; missing observability m
